title: Upon Prudence Baldwin: Her Sickness.
content:
Prue, my dearest maid, is sick,
    Almost to be lunatic:
    �sculapius! come and bring
    Means for her recovering;
    And a gallant cock shall be
    Offer'd up by her to thee.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Prudence Baldwin: Her Sickness."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
